# Results

All analysis were conducted using `r r_citations$r`. `r r_citations$pkgs`.

In the current version of the manuscript, we included `r length(unique(analysis_data$study_id)) %>% apa_num()` studies from `r length(unique(analysis_data$publication_id)) %>% apa_num()` publications, spanning `r length(unique(analysis_data$subject)) %>% apa_num()` participants contributing `r nrow(analysis_data) %>% apa_num()` trials. A complete list of the included publications can be found in Table \@ref(tab:table-db-overview).
